name: pulp-riscv-dbg
description: PULP-platform RISC-V Debug Module implementing RISC-V Debug Spec 0.13. Lightweight alternative to opentitan-rv-dm — uses plain req/gnt bus (or OBI variant), no OpenTitan lifecycle/alert/RACL/OTP dependencies. ~15 top-level ports; JTAG TAP is a separate module (dmi_jtag.sv) and can be swapped for a Xilinx BSCAN TAP (dmi_bscane_tap.sv) on FPGA.

interfaces.description: Async active-low reset — connect power-on reset (NOT system reset)
Word address of the next debug module in the chain (0x0 = this is the leaf). Per RISC-V Debug Spec, chain-tail modules set nextdm to 0x0.
Non-debug module reset request — OR into system reset tree
NDM reset acknowledgement pulse from system reset controller
Async per-hart debug request to CPU
Per-hart availability indicator (1 = hart unavailable, e.g. power down)
Per-hart info struct (dm::hartinfo_t) — describes number of scratch CSRs, data registers, etc.
Memory-mapped slave bus (plain req/gnt/we/addr/be/wdata/rdata). Debugger CSRs + debug ROM + program buffer. Covers 2 × DmBaseAddress size region.
Memory-mapped master bus — System Bus Access (SBA) for debugger-initiated R/W. Uses standard req/gnt handshake plus master_r_valid/r_err/r_other_err/r_rdata response channel.

Debug Module Interface request from DTM (Debug Transport Module, typically JTAG or TL-UL). Handshake: dmi_req_valid_i / dmi_req_ready_o / dmi_req_i (dm::dmi_req_t struct). Compatible with RocketChip Debug Module.
DMI response to DTM. Handshake: dmi_resp_valid_o / dmi_resp_ready_i / dmi_resp_o (dm::dmi_resp_t struct).
Synchronous clear request from DTM to clear the DMI response FIFO

parameters.name: NrHarts
parameters.description: Number of harts this debug module supports. 1 for single-core integrations.

parameters.name: BusWidth
parameters.description: Data bus width for slave/master ports. 32 for RV32, 64 for RV64.

parameters.name: DmBaseAddress
parameters.description: Base address of the debug module slave region. Default non-zero page per RISC-V Debug Spec (first DM at 0x0 is a SPEC requirement for the leaf module).

parameters.name: SelectableHarts
parameters.description: Bitmask of physically available harts — useful for systems that don't use contiguous hart numbers

parameters.name: ReadByteEnable
parameters.description: Drive master_be_o during read transactions (new behavior toggle)

features: RISC-V Debug Spec 0.13 compliant debug module
JTAG TAP (dmi_jtag.sv + dmi_jtag_tap.sv) or Xilinx BSCAN TAP (dmi_bscane_tap.sv) — swappable at integration time
Plain req/gnt bus protocol (slave + master) — lightweight, protocol-agnostic
OBI variant available as alternative top (dm_obi_top.sv)
Debug Module Interface (DMI) compatible with RocketChip DTM
System Bus Access (SBA) for debugger-initiated memory R/W
NDM reset request with acknowledgement handshake
Optional BSCANE TAP for Xilinx FPGA targets

compliance.attribution: PULP utility library. MUST-HAVE: dmi_cdc.sv instantiates cdc_2phase_clearable; dm_csrs.sv instantiates fifo_v3.
PULP technology-abstract cells. MUST-HAVE: dmi_jtag_tap.sv instantiates tc_clk_inverter and tc_clk_mux2.
